user_intent_preservation.original_goal: Implement eGTM ATOM PWM for 3-phase inverter on TC4D7 (KIT_A3G_TC4D7_LITE) using unified IfxEgtm_Pwm, with center-aligned 20 kHz, 1 µs dead-time via DTM, complementary HS/LS, initial duties U=25%, V=50%, W=75%, HS active-high / LS active-low, push-pull, pad driver cmosAutomotiveSpeed1, syncStart and syncUpdate; ATOM from FXCLK0 and DTM from CMU CLK0; pin mapping TBD.
user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: Generate three complementary HS/LS PWM pairs from eGTM Cluster 1 ATOM1 channels (U: ch0/ch1, V: ch2/ch3, W: ch4/ch5) with center-aligned modulation at 20 kHz, 1 µs rising/falling dead-time, initial duties 25/50/75%, synchronous start and synchronous duty updates, with required pin output modes and polarities.
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Use high-level unified IfxEgtm_Pwm on TC4xx. Enable EGTM and clocks (FXCLK0 for ATOM, CMU CLK0 for DTM). Configure Cluster 1 ATOM1 base + sync channels as contiguous (ch0..5) with center-aligned mode, complementary outputs via DTM with 1 µs dead-time, HS active-high and LS active-low. Map TOUT pins via IfxEgtm_PinMap_setAtomTout with push-pull and pad driver cmosAutomotiveSpeed1. Perform syncStart using IfxEgtm_Pwm_startSyncedChannels and use non-immediate update APIs for syncUpdate.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: Unified PWM driver supports multi-channel synchronized PWM, complementary pairs with DTM dead-time, center-aligned mode, and synchronous start/update on TC4xx EGTM. It minimizes complexity while meeting advanced motor-inverter requirements.

runtime_function.name: updateEgtmAtom3phInvDuty
runtime_function.purpose: Apply synchronized duty-cycle updates for U/V/W phases (non-immediate to honor syncUpdate).

driver_changes: IfxGtm_Pwm -> IfxEgtm_Pwm (unified PWM driver, TC3xx to TC4xx)
IfxScuWdt -> IfxWtu (watchdog services, TC3xx to TC4xx)

api_changes.reason: GTM TOM to EGTM ATOM naming on TC4xx
GTM TOM to EGTM ATOM naming on TC4xx

migration_notes.context_preserved: The unified IfxEgtm_Pwm configures Cluster 1 ATOM1 channels 0..5 as a contiguous base+sync set for center-aligned 20 kHz PWM. Complementary HS/LS with HS active-high and LS active-low is enforced using IfxEgtm_Pwm_setChannelPolarity and DTM-based dead-time set to 1 µs rising/falling via IfxEgtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDeadTime. SyncStart is achieved with IfxEgtm_Pwm_startSyncedChannels and SyncUpdate by using non-immediate update APIs. ATOM is clocked from FXCLK0 and DTM from CMU CLK0 using IfxEgtm_Cmu_enableClocks and IfxEgtm_Dtm_setClockSource. TOUT pin mapping is applied with IfxEgtm_PinMap_setAtomTout in push-pull with pad driver cmosAutomotiveSpeed1, noting that final pin macros must be verified in IfxEgtm_PinMap.h for TC4D7.
